Former worker here, and just to let everyone know, McDonald's cleaning practices for the rags they wipe the tables they make your food on, is to wash them in bleach, just bleach.. no soap or detergent, but bleach. Which does nothing as it is a sanitizer only and meant to be used in tandem with a soap or detergent. So, you are eating food that has many days worth of grime from the rags that are literally always dirty. I almost got them shut down over it and my friend said nothing changed.

Now it's not possible anymore.

I have never once been able to place an order without the app just freezing or having me start over. I love when I get there and try to enter my parking spot number in the app, just to have it close my order, and when I finally get back to the correct screen, the keyboard lags.

But the nicest thing about the app is that if anything is wrong with your order, you’re out of luck. You can’t get support, there’s not even a phone number or email for the restaurant itself! And when you call the restaurant, no answer.

I’m lovin’ losing money 9 times out of 10 because the order is incomplete. Can’t get a refund, there’s no such feature in this app.

Food delivery services are not great, but at least I can get support and a refund when there’s an issue!

After updating to the latest iOS version, Apple Pay no longer works inside the McDonald’s Canada app. I tried multiple cards, restarted the phone, logged out and back in, and tested at different locations — same result every time. Apple Pay still works normally on the in-store kiosk, and rewards/coupons work fine in the app, so this appears to be an app payment compatibility issue rather than a bank or Apple Pay problem. Please fix the mobile payment bug.

This app takes like.. an entire minute to load and count your inputs at the first launch. Which is normally fine i guess, but when they want you to pull it up in a drive-thru it’s annoying. the deals are good and the points are alright, but just PLEASE optimize this app more so it doesn’t take days to work
This app is buggy, when I tell them my code, it just doesn’t work for them. I’ve tried 6 different times. So I’m owed many points but it just won’t work. I can’t even redeem the points I have.
Takes forever to load abd slow to navigate.

The app takes way too long to load, which can be so inconvenient if you’re in the store at the counter and there’s a long line behind you. There’s no reason why the app should take so long to load especially if you’re on Wi-Fi. Also, please bring back sustainable straws something more durable. The paper straws are very inconvenient. They rip, they get soggy, there’s holes and you can enjoy your drink. Please add a “notes” option under customization because some customization doesn’t allow you to fully choose what you want. for example if I wanted light pickles or to select the amount of pickles that I want etc. things like lots of ice or little ice etc. I’d like to be able to type what I want to add for notes and not forced to choose the options from “customize”. please add a “dress like a Mac” option under customizations for burgers. a lot of times I like my burgers dressed like a Mac and I don’t have the option. I have to do it manually, which is ordering extra lettuce and ordering Mac sauce and that can be very messy especially if I’m on the road. It’s a lot more convenient if the restaurant can do that for you. please add pancake syrup or maple syrup to condiments. It’s so frustrating having to ask for it every single time. I would rather being able to select it on the app with my order instead of having to come in and ask for it or ask for it at the drive-through which takes up time and sometimes you can tell that the workers are frustrated having to make more than one trip getting things for your order. We don’t have to pay for extra onions on our burgers but have to pay extra for lettuce. That doesn’t make sense considering most burgers already come with lettuce so why would we need to pay for extra. Also the price of “$1.99” to add ONCE bacon strip is insane. Almost $2 for one strip of bacon? And almost $4 for two strips? One strip usually isn’t  enough to cover the whole burger/ sandwich and the cost of an add on should never be higher than the cost of the burger/ sandwich itself. Please fix the pricing structure for this. McDonald’s is a huge staple in the food industry, fast, easy, affordable pricing. Charging $2-$4 for a strip or two of bacon seems like a money grab instead of tending to your customers needs. Having to pay $.30 per sauce for an order that most ppl use sauce to eat seems unfair. Ie) most people who order nuggets usually dip them in some type of sauce. Every nugget order should come with at least two sauces and charge more if customer needs more than two.
I have trouble logging in to this app in this .4 version and I never recieve a link to log in. Please have the option to enter password at least. OR come out with a better version.
The connection sucks and it is losing my points all the time, took me 15 miniutes to get on a certain screen and it definitely was not my wifi. Lots of offers though just expensive ones.
I searched it up first if mcdonalds app allows pay with paypal. It says it does but opening the app, there is no option for paypal

The app is a notorious drain on battery life and is constantly requesting location and accessing phone insights even when it is not in use. Recommend screenshotting your Reward ID and using the kiosk or downloading the app to use on an as needed basis or else your phone battery will be destroyed.

After the last update I can no longer login. No matter how many times I put my email in I never receive the code. Contacted support and so far they have been unable to help. Sad to lose all my points!
The popups and delay loading are maddening when going through the drive thru.
This app is the slowest thing I've ever used. For a billion-dollar corporation to have such a slow app is mind-boggling.

Make the app so that we can upload gift cards
Worst app ever? I find myself watching the app spinning, spinning, spinning; trying to load my code. Why is it so difficult? Ditch the ads, make it black and white. Anything.

J’ai utilisé dans le passé l’application.  Malheureusement maintenant j’ai toujours un message d’erreur.  J’ai tenté de désinstaller l’application et la réinstaller et sans succès.  Je n’arrive pas à me déconnecter de mon compte alors je ne peux en créer un nouveau.  J’ai donc perdu les points accumulés et je ne peux plus en accumuler…

Previously I could use the app for months without having to log into it with my credentials. 

Now I must log into the app every day. Very annoying.

The app has been lacking design and user experience consideration for years and not getting better. Log in option is very cumbersome, promotional pops up are annoying and slow to close, ordering steps/lists are long hard to find, multi click require to order one simple coffee. Donation page is 2 screens long for no reason. I truly think McDonald’s Canada did not bother to invest in proper app design. Overall, long way to get close to what an app should be.
McDo is mc do
I can’t ever use my rewards. The app doesn’t work and the people that work at McDonalds don’t have a workaround so my points either expire or get lost in cyberspace

This app just keeps getting worse and worse. Doesn’t load half the time. Too many pop ups. Slow. Logs you out and asks to re-login again. By the time you get through all these, you’ve held up the whole line. The cashiers must hate it as well.
When opening the app, it is very slow and do not allow to quickly close their promoted meals. This totally nullifies the point of online ordering for quicker transactions.

I’m sitting in the McDonald’s drive-through, trying to give them my code so I can use coupons and get points, but when I open the app I’m blasted with an ad that won’t go away. Why do you need to advertise me McDonald’s WHEN I’M AT MCDONALDS!? That’s fine, I guess I’ll just sit in the drive-through for an extra 2 1/2 minutes and slow everyone down behind me, just so you can advertise to me something I’m already gonna buy. Brilliant!
On top of that, the points disappear after a few months. So unless you’re going to McDonald’s multiple times a week, don’t expect to actually earn any rewards.

My American Express credit card is tied to the app as a payment mechanism. In 4 separate occurrences my card was charged after I provided the 4-digit code, but when I got to the drive thru window they told me that I didn’t pay. In one instance there was a lag in payment. In the other three, the payment never went through on their end. Very frustrating and unreliable. Tim Hortons app payments ALWAYS work. I expect more from a company that’s many magnitudes bigger in revenue.
App is so glitchy it barely works half the time

I have no idea how your app has such high reviews, but your app should be a case study for atrocious UI, app design, and functionality. 

Did you get your app devs from Temu or something
Only points app out there where you earn decent rewards!
The slowest app in my phone
Id love to get notifications when i order food

Some improvements have been made (e.g. making it easier to pick the closest location), but more difficulties have been added.   I’m really tired of closing extra windows trying to sell me things I’m not interested in, having to click “not today”, and having 1/3 of other screens occupied with something I don’t order with a big “Order Now” button next to it.   Please give me an “Order Never” button!  I’m still tired of there being a morning Egg McMuffin and an after 11:00 a.m Egg McMuffin which apparently is a totally different thing (Just try and reorder a morning McMuffin in the afternoon, and pray you never order at 10:59 and have to redo your order!).  And today, I requested “no butter” on the app, and the kitchen labels printed “CHEESE only” instead!  At least the crew person had the initiative to check with me while making up my order and saved me a trip back.

And exceptional scam. Worst app I’ve ever had the displeasure of using. Takes 5 minutes just to load and at that point you 7 minutes pasted paying. And tremendously scam. You bed actually collect the point because you just give up want for it to load. Billion dollar company and they can’t have a app that loads.
App is super slow, all the time. Doesn’t matter what menu you press navigation is slow, code take forever to load, absolutely terrible.

Overcomplicated slow, and not user-friendly this app is a pain in the butt. Give me a coupon let them scan it and then I can pay. It does not have to be complicated. While in the drive-through at one location, this app ordered a fries for me at a completely different location and the very unhelpful staff rather than fixing the issue made me pay full price at the location I was at. Very unhelpful.
une fois sur 2 mon code d’offre ne fonctionne pas car ça dit que j’ai déjà utilisé un code le même jour alors que non!
Using the app is horrid, Entering payment information is so frustrating I’d rather be hungry.

Previously the McDonalds app would automatically choose the location closest to you, and if you were to arrive at a different location it would change your pickup location for you. This new update does neither of these features, and it’s twice now I’ve had to request a refund because I’ve become accustomed to the app update my closest location. The most frustrating part about this is that the offer I used originally is not available after requesting a refund and so I’m unable to make an order and have to take my business elsewhere. I have no idea why a change like this would be made, it completely ruins my experience with the app and loses McDonald’s money I would have spent
This app isn’t good for ordering food to your house. Use another one instead.

(EDIT, Apr 20, 2026) 
The app was fine until it started recently logging me out EVERY SINGLE TIME. When it popped up”please login” again this morning, I’ve had enough and went to Tim Hortons instead. If you want to keep your customers, consider fixing your app.
—-
The app does the job but could use improvement. 1) every time you open it, it automatically resets to the closest location. It would be better if instead it defaulted to the most recent or most frequent. Or not default to any at all. My closest location is not the one I prefer to go to and it gets quite annoying when you forget about it and end up placing the order at the wrong location. 2) the app doesn’t detect the completed order very well, so next time you open it to order, you discover that your old order is still active so you have to remove already completed items before placing new order.
Slowest app I have ever downloaded, keeps crashing as I try to scan to get points, trying to get it open is an issue on its own
